name: chain_sub_agents
description: Run a sequence of sub-agents, each passing its result to the next via ${agents[<prev>].result_text}.

chain.description: Step ids (and their subagent_template names) in execution order. Format: 'id:template'.

steps.description: First link; spawned with chain[0]'s template.
steps.user_prompt: Begin the chain. Process the user's overall request and produce a result the next link can build on.

steps.description: Placeholder — replaced via compose_workflow when the chain length is known at runtime.
